title: Italian Provincia Dataset Entry
description: Schema for a single Italian provincia entry, including ISTAT code, sigla, regione, and prevailing ATECO sectors.

slug.title: URL-safe slug
slug.description: Lowercase, hyphen-separated identifier for the provincia (e.g., 'milano', 'reggio-emilia').

sigla.title: Sigla automobilistica
sigla.description: Two-letter Italian vehicle registration code for the provincia (e.g., 'MI', 'RE', 'TO').

regione.title: Regione
regione.description: Italian region to which the provincia belongs.

capoluogo.title: Capoluogo di regione
capoluogo.description: True if this provincia is the capital of its region.

codiceISTAT.title: Codice ISTAT
codiceISTAT.description: ISTAT numeric code for the provincia.

ATECOPrevalenti.title: ATECO prevalenti
ATECOPrevalenti.description: List of prevailing ATECO 2007 sector codes for the provincia, ordered by economic relevance.
